title: Mini Mob Spawn Eggs
description: I had made some pixel art of all the Minecraft Mobs and some people suggested to turn it into a resource pack for the spawn eggs, so I did!
body:
I had made some pixel art of all the Minecraft Mobs and some people suggested to turn it into a resource pack for the spawn eggs, so I did!

This was designed to be a much easier way of telling spawn eggs apart, as the current ones are often complained about being difficult to memorise, so this pack turns them into little cartoony versions of the mobs for easier access.
